fixtures.subject: Who’s Requesting You Directl y? The Easiest Bookings Ever
fixtures.body:
Hot Leads & Smart Cancellations: See Whatâs New
Hi David,
Weâve just rolled out two new features designed to make your bookings smoother and your client relationships stronger:
1. Direct Requests: When Clients Ask for You
Now you can see when a booking request was made specifically for you!
If a request shows âSource: Public Profileâ, it means the client chose you directly, no competition involved.
ð¡ Tip: These are your highest-converting opportunities. Respond quickly with a friendly, personalized message to lock in the booking.
2. Controlled Cancellations
We know things donât always go as planned. If you ever need to cancel a service, you can now do it directly from your dashboard. Just select a reason, and the client will be automatically notified.
Remember, cancellations should always be a last resort: they affect client trust and future bookings.
Both updates are live now, check them out in your dashboard!
With your bookings in mind,
The Private Chef Manager Team
Got questions? fixtures.subject: How I made $160k+ on yhangry in a few months
fixtures.body:
Hey Chef,
I'm Mike, and I joined yhangry last year.
Since then, I completed 100+ bookings and earned more than $160k on the platform.
I'm reaching out becauseÂ you have what it takes to be very successful on this platform.
I'd love to have a chat and answer any questions you might have about working with yhangry.
About me:
* I worked as a restaurant chef for many years
* I owned and ran my own restaurant for a few years, and found yhangry after IÂ hadÂ toÂ closeÂ it down post-COVID.
* CheckÂ outÂ my yhangry chef profile: https://yhangry.com/booking/chef/Mike-S/ ( https://yhangry.com/booking/chef/Mike-S/?utm_campaign=SUPPLY%3A+chef+mike+welcome+call+%2F+sign+ups+%28oct+16%29&utm_content=SUPPLY%3A+chef+mike+welcome+call+%2F+sign+ups+%28cct+16%29&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )
ð Book a call with me ( https://calendly.com/heinin/welcome-call?utm_campaign=SUPPLY%3A+chef+mike+welcome+call+%2F+sign+ups+%28oct+16%29&utm_content=SUPPLY%3A+chef+mike+welcome+call+%2F+sign+ups+%28cct+16%29&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )
This will be a small group session alongside other chefs. Itâs a chance to askÂ questionsÂ and understand whether yhangry could be a good fit for you.
Hope to see you soon,
Chef Mike
Chef Mentorship @ yhangry

fixtures.subject: Booking request for Nov 16, 2025 in Cos cob connecticut
fixtures.body:
Hello David,Â Â Â Â
We've matched you with a new client request!
ð Event date: Nov 16, 2025
Â
ð° Budget: $4000 ($1,000.00pp)
Â
ð Location: Cos cob connecticut (ca. 176-352 miles away)
Â
ð¯ Number of people: 4 adults Â
Â
ð½ Other
Â
ð¦º Dietaries: OtherÂ
Â
ð Cuisines:
Â
ð¥ Preferences: AVOID
Anything processedâ¯
High Fructose, sugar
White bread, pasta, riceâ¯ - instead use things such as lentil pasta, edamame spaghetti (basically plant based and high in protein not carbs)
Alcohol
Organ and Game meats (eg bacon, sausages, venison)
*Certain seafood (Scallops, mussels, Sardines, anchovies, tuna, mackerel)
Meat gravies and yeast extractsâ¯
Root/starchy veg such as potatoes, parsnips, beetroots
Tomatoes
Ripe bananas, grapes, mangoes, pears, figs, dates, watermelon, (sugar ++)
Dried fruit
â¯
*Some fish, including salmon, sole, tuna (skipjack and albacore), catfish, red snapper, tilapia, flounder, and whitefish are lower in purine than other types of fish, and can be included in your diet inâ¯moderationâ¯(two to three times per week) if you are not consuming other purine-rich foods and of course there is the huge benefits of some fish being rich in omega 3
â¯â¯
MODERATION/LIMIT
Red meat (1-2 x week)
Fish (as above)
Bone broth
Cauliflower, peas, carrots, asparagus (although he does not seem to like carrots or asparagus)
Mushrooms (Birch, Morchels and Chanterelles only) , *Spinach, Sweetcorn, Aubergine
Strawberries and Oranges (although low GI they are in night shade family which is inflammatory )
Apples, Stoned fruit (such as peaches, plums, cherries), Blueberries, Blackberries, and raspberries â still quite high in sugar but lowest of all fruits and best fruits in terms of antioxidants, etc
Dark chocolate 80% and over
*Spinach can be eaten if in a dish rich in calciumâ¯eg cheese as this blocks the high oxalateâ¯content being absorbed.â¯
Except for the above eat everything else. Varied diet and moderation.
The below foods are particularly good: â¯
Non-starchy vegetables - eg broccoli, red peppers, cabbage, green beans, lettuce, celery â all these great
Avocadoâ¯
Unsweetened organic dairy - natural kefir yoghurt, cottage cheese, unsweetened almond /oat/ coconut milk (the make Plenish is great) , cream, full fat milk (organic only)
Chicken
All beans and pulses
Wholegrains - try choosing things such as spelt, quinoa, etc over wheat as higher in protein and less inflammatory. Also things that are sprouted and fermented are very good.â¯
Organic and non-processed wherever possibleâ¯
Encourage apple cider vinegar, lemon juice, ginger, turmericâ¯in as muchâ¯foods /cooking as possible.â¯
Add collagen powder to yogurt, smoothies and protein shakes â all of which should be unsweetened
Use maple syrup, coconut sugar or stevia if needing sugar (but LIMIT)
Do not drink within 20 minutes either side of food or with food if possible
Send a quote ( https://yhangry.com/booking/account/chef/quotes/94885?utm_campaign=SUPPLY%3A+New+Request+%282025+Oct%29&utm_content=SUPPLY%3A+New+customer+request+%28HZ%29&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )Our tips for getting bookings
ð Reply quickly: Customers are most likely to book chefs who respond within 24 hours.
Â
âï¸ Call the customer after sending a menu and price so that you can discuss menu changes in detail. You can start the call with:
"Hi Dacine, yhangry asked me to call you about your event on Nov 16, 2025. I'm a chef and would love to help you create the perfect menu for your special event [birthday, hen party etc.]".Â
âï¸ Keep all communications on yhangry: Sharing personal contact details / social media will result in your account getting suspended.

fixtures.subject: Hey Chef, this one’s worth opening
fixtures.body:
Hi David,
As we dive into the holiday season (aka chef peak mode), hereâs a quick roundup of wins from your fellow Yhangry chefs. ðð¥
Real stories, real momentum, and a reminder that youâre part of an amazing communityÂ â¤µ
********************************************************
ð¨âð³ How Chef Sam Went All In â And It Paid Off
********************************************************
After 18+ years running busy kitchens, Chef Sam wanted more freedom â and ended up building a private dining business that took off. ð
With 168 events and 129 five-star reviews on Yhangry, heâs now one of our most in-demand chefs, known for premium menus, sharp service, and a brand that books itself.
ð How Sam turned chef talent into a high-growth solo business ( https://yhangry.com/how-chef-sam-used-yhangry-to-level-up-his-private-business/?utm_campaign=Chef+Newsletter_November&utm_content=Chef+Newsletter_November&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )
( https://yhangry.com/how-chef-sam-used-yhangry-to-level-up-his-private-business/?utm_campaign=Chef+Newsletter_November&utm_content=Chef+Newsletter_November&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )
**************************************************
ðÂ  Self-Taught & Unstoppable: Meet Chef Shilna
**************************************************
Chef Shilna went from self-taught home cook to one of our most in-demand chefs â all driven by pure passion, creativity, and a LOT of colourful, flavour-packed plates. ð«
A Yhangry trial gave her the confidence boost she neededâ¦ and her very first event? An 18-guest Italian feast she absolutely nailed.
Since then, sheâs levelled up her plating, her pricing, and her whole chef brand.
ð How Shilna turned home-grown talent into a thriving private-chef career ( https://yhangry.com/self-taught-cooks-private-chef-shilna/?utm_campaign=Chef+Newsletter_November&utm_content=Chef+Newsletter_November&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )
( https://yhangry.com/self-taught-cooks-private-chef-shilna/?utm_campaign=Chef+Newsletter_November&utm_content=Chef+Newsletter_November&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )
*********************************************************
ð¥¥ Chef Mark Is Bringing Kamayan Feasts to Centre Stage
*********************************************************
Chef Mark always dreamed of putting authentic Filipino flavours on the map â but his kamayan feasts were a hidden gem. That changed when he started private cheffing.
He went from the occasional booking to fully booked weekends, all while championing bold, festive, hands-on Filipino dining. ð´â¨

â
*****************************************************
ð¥ Chef Dan: A Career Built Around Life, Not Shifts
*****************************************************
After years in London kitchens â Dan hit the point so many chefs know too well: long hours, no time at home, and zero balance.
Private cheffing with yhangry flipped the script. Today he runs around 10 events a month, cooks the regional Thai dishes he actually loves, and builds his schedule around his kids â not the other way around.
ð Danâs switch to a life-first chef career ( https://yhangry.com/chef-dan-work-life-reboot-through-private-cheffing/?utm_campaign=Chef+Newsletter_November&utm_content=Chef+Newsletter_November&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )

fixtures.body:
Hey DavidÂ ,
We've got a birthday booking request in Plymouth that sounds like a fun one.
The Request:
 * Dec 22, 2025 | 8 guests | 30th Birthday celebration
 * Location: Plymouth, MA (01772)
 * Budget: $1,000
 * No dietary restrictions
 * Style: Casual buffet
 * Food preferences: Greek, Italian, and local lobster rolls
Your Pricing, Your Call:
The client's budget is $1,000, but you decide what to charge. If you need to quote higher based on your menu, guest count, or travel distance, just explain your reasoning in the proposal. Clients appreciate knowing what they're paying for.
Remember to include travel costs and factor in our 20% platform fee when pricing.
Ready to Send Your Proposal?

fixtures.body:
Hi David,
Between the rush of prep and plating, hereâs your quick dose of chef inspo ð½ï¸
Weâve rounded up a few standout Yhangry stories â real chefs, real wins, and a reminder that youâre part of something bigger. ðªâ¤µ
****************************************************************
ð¨âð³ 600+ Events Later: Chef Fouadâs Recipe for Freedom
****************************************************************
>From Algerian home kitchens to French fine dining, Chef Fouad swapped long restaurant shifts for freedom... and never looked back.Â ð
What started as a few side gigs on Yhangry turned into 600+ bookings and a steady full-time career.
His secret?Â  Smart pricing, great service, and always playing the long game. âIf Yhangry grows, I grow,â he says. ð¬
ð Fouadâs journey to building a thriving solo career ( https://yhangry.com/private-chef-income-chef-fouad-yhangry/?utm_campaign=October+2025%3A+Chef+Newsletter&utm_content=October+2025%3A+Chef+Newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )
( https://yhangry.com/private-chef-income-chef-fouad-yhangry/?utm_campaign=October+2025%3A+Chef+Newsletter&utm_content=October+2025%3A+Chef+Newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )
***************************************
ð£ From Hidden Talent to Fully Booked
***************************************
For years, Chef Keikoâs artistry â from delicate sushi to teppanyaki â went unnoticed. That changed when she joined Yhangry.
She went from 4 bookings a year to 4 a month, all while staying true to her roots in Japanese cuisine. Now, sheâs one of our most requested chefs â blending tradition, perfection, and quiet confidence into every dish. ð¸â¨
ð See how Keiko turned quiet talent into steady success ( https://yhangry.com/how-yhangry-helped-chef-keiko-get-discovered-and-fully-booked/?utm_campaign=October+2025%3A+Chef+Newsletter&utm_content=October+2025%3A+Chef+Newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )
( https://yhangry.com/how-yhangry-helped-chef-keiko-get-discovered-and-fully-booked/?utm_campaign=October+2025%3A+Chef+Newsletter&utm_content=October+2025%3A+Chef+Newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )
*********************************
ð¨ Turning Every Plate into Art
*********************************
Chef Jessicaâs story proves that plating isnât just presentation â itâs personality.Â
>From red-and-pink hens to elegant dinner parties, Jessicaâs signature touches â flowers, cake stands, even her silver shell butter dish â make every table unforgettable.
Her tip for new chefs? Plan, practice, and let the plate tell the story. ð½ï¸
ð Jessicaâs plating secrets youâll want to steal ( https://yhangry.com/plating-tips-chef-jessica-yhangry/?utm_campaign=October+2025%3A+Chef+Newsletter&utm_content=October+2025%3A+Chef+Newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )
( https://yhangry.com/plating-tips-chef-jessica-yhangry/?utm_campaign=October+2025%3A+Chef+Newsletter&utm_content=October+2025%3A+Chef+Newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )
â
*****************************************************
ð¥ From long restaurant shifts to live dining magic
*****************************************************
Chef Eduard swapped 16-hour days at the Radisson for something more personal. Now, in private homes he brings dinner to life â slicing, sizzling and storytelling right in front of his guests.
âI let my guests design the menu â they love being involved,â he says.Â
ð Chef Eduardâs journey from kitchen shifts to live dining magic ( https://yhangry.com/private-chef-live-cooking-dinner-party-eduard-yhangry/?utm_campaign=October+2025%3A+Chef+Newsletter&utm_content=October+2025%3A+Chef+Newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )

************************
ð² Before You Head Off
************************
Weâve been loving all your Instagram ( https://www.instagram.com/yhangry/?utm_campaign=October+2025%3A+Chef+Newsletter&utm_content=October+2025%3A+Chef+Newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )story tags â keep them coming! ð¥ð«

âThatâs a wrap for this monthâs kitchen stories ð¬

Since starting yhangry in 2019, weâve changed the lives of thousands of chefs by providing access to lucrative private dining bookings and paying them $11m+.
yhangry ( https://yhangry.com/?utm_campaign=US%3A+Chef+Sign+Up+Series&utm_content=US+chef+sign+up+email+1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )
At yhangry, you make the decisions: when you want to work, where you want to work, what you want to cook, and how much you want to charge.
Browsing requests and sending quotes is free - no need to buy credits, no subscription to access the platform.
We only get paid when you get paid: When a client confirms their booking, we charge a 20% commission. Just include our commission in the prices you quote. For example, to earn $800, mark it up by 1.25 and quote $1,000.

Chosen by our expert panel.
Hi David,
Ever wondered what makes a private chef truly exceptional?
At Yhangry, weâve spent years building the UKâs largest private chef network â and now, as we expand to the US, weâre bringing our tried-and-tested method for finding culinary greatness.
Each month, we:
â¢ Shortlist 50 chefs from across the country based on their dishes, menus, photos, bookings and standout reviews

fixtures.subject: Are professional food photos worth the investment?
fixtures.body:
Yhangry ( https://yhangry.com/?utm_campaign=SUPPLY%3A+Chef+Activation+Series+%5BUS%5D&utm_content=temp+photos&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )Yes, professional photos increase you conversion rate
Hi Chef David,
Think of your yhangry chef profile like your LinkedIn profile, but more visual.
Clients review your profile to determine whether they should choose you over another chef.
Your bio, reviews, etc., are all important, but a photo speaks a thousand words.
Based on our data, if you're competing with a chef who has invested in amazing photography, 9 out of 10 times, the client will book the chef with professional photographyÂ over the chef without DIY looking photos.
Which chef would you book?
Tiramisu is a crowd pleaser, and Chef Rubecca's (right) profile photo is not bad, but Chef John (left) has a higher conversion rate.
His background photo: great lighting, beautifully plated food
His profile photo: good lighting, close enough to see a (friendly) face, professional chef attire
Update my photos ( https://yhangry.com/booking/chef-register?utm_campaign=SUPPLY%3A+Chef+Activation+Series+%5BUS%5D&utm_content=temp+photos&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )Use a photo in chef attire as your background photo
Professional photos require an investment: time to prepare the dishes, money for ingredients, and money to hire a photographer.
If you have a good photo of yourself in chef attire, we recommend using that as your background photo instead of a mediocre-quality food photo.
Update my photos ( https://yhangry.com/booking/chef-register?utm_campaign=SUPPLY%3A+Chef+Activation+Series+%5BUS%5D&utm_content=temp+photos&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )Facebook ( https://www.facebook.com/yhangry?utm_campaign=SUPPLY%3A+Chef+Activation+Series+%5BUS%5D&utm_content=temp+photos&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )Instagram ( https://www.instagram.com/yhangry/?utm_campaign=SUPPLY%3A+Chef+Activation+Series+%5BUS%5D&utm_content=temp+photos&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )
LinkedIn ( https://www.linkedin.com/company/14793893?utm_campaign=SUPPLY%3A+Chef+Activation+Series+%5BUS%5D&utm_content=temp+photos&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )

fixtures.subject: This is the biggest mistake most chefs make 🤫
fixtures.body:
Yhangry ( https://yhangry.com/?utm_campaign=SUPPLY%3A+Chef+Sign+Up+Series+%5BUS%5D&utm_content=Menus&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )Hey Chef David,
Crafting a top-selling menu is hard. To make it easier, here are our tips:
â Don't make your client feel stupid. Avoid using complicated words that clients may need to Look up.
â Don't make your dishes so simple that they're uninspiring.
A menu is not just a list of dishes; it's a story.
Play ( https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HPduklwxiU0&utm_campaign=SUPPLY%3A+Chef+Sign+Up+Series+%5BUS%5D&utm_content=Menus&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )
Upload menus ( https://yhangry.com/booking/chef-register?utm_campaign=SUPPLY%3A+Chef+Sign+Up+Series+%5BUS%5D&utm_content=Menus&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )Clients are most likely to book a chef who responds to their request promptly, within a couple of hours.Â
Having different menus set up allows you to quickly choose the right menu for a new request.
We recommend uploading 10 menus across the most popular cuisines:
Italian
Mexican/Latin
Japanese
BBQ
Pan Asian
Festive (Thanksgiving / Christmas / NYE)
Modern American
Cajun/Creole
Caribbean
Indian
Middle Eastern
The most popular menu format: 4 courses across
Nibbles / CanapÃ©s / Finger food
4-5 options across meat, fish, veg - choose 1
Starters
4-5 options across meat, fish, veg - choose 1
Mains
4-5 options across meat, fish, veg - choose 1
Desserts
4-5 options across meat, fish, veg - choose 1
If a client wants more than 1 option per course, you can upsell them. If a client has a high budget, you can easily increase the number of options included.
Upload menus ( https://yhangry.com/booking/chef-register?utm_campaign=SUPPLY%3A+Chef+Sign+Up+Series+%5BUS%5D&utm_content=Menus&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )Facebook ( https://www.facebook.com/yhangry?utm_campaign=SUPPLY%3A+Chef+Sign+Up+Series+%5BUS%5D&utm_content=Menus&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )Instagram ( https://www.instagram.com/yhangry/?utm_campaign=SUPPLY%3A+Chef+Sign+Up+Series+%5BUS%5D&utm_content=Menus&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )

fixtures.subject: Chef David, can I spotlight you in the yhangry newsletter?
fixtures.body:
Hi Chef David, it's Heinin from yhangry.
I'm sending a US launch newsletter to our US client waitlist, and I'm looking for 10 chef profiles to highlight across different locations.
I'd love to feature you in this newsletter.
To get one of the slots, please complete your chef profile ASAP (latest Monday Oct 13) and email me back as soon as that's done. Slots will go on a first come first serve basis.
Your profile needs to have:
* High-quality profile photo in which you look like a professional chef (wearing chef whites/apron)
* High-quality background photo: Either of a beautifully plated dish/table or of yourself in a professional setting cooking or serving clients
* At least 3 menus for clients to browse so they get an idea of your style of food. I recommend having a festive menu (Thanksgiving/Christmas), a BBQ menu, and a menu of your favourite cuisine e.g. Italian, Mexican, Japanese
etc.
Hope to hear from you!
Best,
Heinin
Co-founder & Co-CEO @ yhangry
Unsubscribe ( https://track.customer.io/unsubscribe/dgST_AcLALijFrejFgGZ2PUcc9HYn5s_BZdDTKY= )

fixtures.subject: Private Chef Industry Report 2025: Earnings, Trends & What ’s Hot In 2026
fixtures.body:
Hi Chef,
Weâve just released the ð¬ð§ UK Private Chef Industry Report 2025 â and itâs packed with insights that can help you earn more and get more bookings.
Here are the juiciest highlights:
ð½ï¸ UK Client demand is up 22%, but chef supply is growing faster (+63%) â More competition, but also more opportunity if you stand out
ð  Half of all bookings are now in rented venues (Airbnbs, event spaces) â and these convert 30% better. Find out how to maximise success.
ð Birthday dinners, hen/stag parties & get-togethers are the fastest-growing event types. Upsell birthday cakes? Upsell an interactive cookalong?
ð² Top cuisines in demand:
Italian, British, and Mediterranean (+96% surge!)
ð§âð³ New client trend: âelevated casualâ â think Ottolenghi-style sharing plates, not fussy fine dining
ð Want to see how much chefs are earning in your region and which cuisines convert best?
Read the full report here ( https://docsend.com/v/wbmj4/uk-private-chef-industry-report-2025?utm_campaign=SUPPLY%3A+uk+private+chef+report+2025+%28Jan+29%29&utm_content=SUPPLY%3A+uk+private+chef+report+2025+%28Jan+28%29&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io ).
LoginÂ using the password "yhangry2025report"
Here's to a big year ahead ð¥
Heinin Zhang
Co-founder & Co-CEO @ yhangry

fixtures.subject: A few chef stories we thought you’d enjoy
fixtures.body:
Hi David,
Cookingâs just the warm-up. The real fun? Picking your hours, your menus, and the events you love. ð¨âð³
Weâre bringing you stories from chefs doing exactly that â read on to see how theyâre making it happen and maybe scoop some inspo for your own path! â¤µ
***************************************
ð¨âð³ From Fine Dining to Freedom
***************************************
After 14 years in London and Italyâs top kitchens, Chef Christian walked away from the pressure of restaurants to find balance and creative freedom. ð
What started as a slow transition soon picked up speed with Yhangry â 197+ events later, he now juggles 3â4 bookings a week, tailors menus to his style, and even adds flair with cocktails like Aperol Spritz and Negroni.
ð Christianâs journey to building a thriving solo career ( https://yhangry.com/yhangry-gave-me-freedom-chef-christian/?utm_campaign=Chef+Newsletter%3A+September+2025&utm_content=Chef+Newsletter%3A+30th+Sept&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )
( https://yhangry.com/yhangry-gave-me-freedom-chef-christian/?utm_campaign=Chef+Newsletter%3A+September+2025&utm_content=Chef+Newsletter%3A+30th+Sept&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )
*********************************************
ð· Why Private Dining Works: Chef Charlotte
*********************************************
Michelin-trained and all about fine dining, Charlotte found private cheffing is more than luxury â itâs personal, fun, and surprisingly accessible â¨
"I think it feels pretty special for both the chef and the client."
She tailors every menu, sets the vibe, and stays the boss of her own kitchen... freedom never tasted so good. ð©âð³
ð See how Charlotte builds a thriving private chef career with yhangry ( https://yhangry.com/why-hiring-a-private-chef-is-worth-it-chef-charlottes-take/?utm_campaign=Chef+Newsletter%3A+September+2025&utm_content=Chef+Newsletter%3A+30th+Sept&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )
( https://yhangry.com/why-hiring-a-private-chef-is-worth-it-chef-charlottes-take/?utm_campaign=Chef+Newsletter%3A+September+2025&utm_content=Chef+Newsletter%3A+30th+Sept&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )
*******************************************************
âï¸ From Pilot to Private Chef: Chef Rajikaâs Leap
*******************************************************
She trained as a pilot, spent a decade in corporate HRâ¦ and somehow ended up racing against the clock for a last-minute Christmas menu. â¨
>From Diwali menu takeovers to birthday bashes and intimate celebrations, Rajika proves that private dining isnât just cooking â itâs a mix of clever prep, creative flair, and making every moment feel effortless for her clients. ð
ð See how Rajika built her private chef identity ( https://yhangry.com/chef-rajika-journey-to-becoming-a-yhangry-private-chef/?utm_campaign=Chef+Newsletter%3A+September+2025&utm_content=Chef+Newsletter%3A+30th+Sept&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )
( https://yhangry.com/chef-rajika-journey-to-becoming-a-yhangry-private-chef/?utm_campaign=Chef+Newsletter%3A+September+2025&utm_content=Chef+Newsletter%3A+30th+Sept&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )â
*********************************************************
ð ï¸ Chef Mbarkâs Top Tips for Smooth Private Events
*********************************************************
>From Marrakech to Michelin kitchens across Europe, Chef Mbark found his rhythm in private dining. ð
But with Yhangry, heâs turned event prep into a superpower: sourcing the best ingredients, mapping out every course, and keeping even last-minute bookings smooth and stress-free. ð¥Â
Keep reading to see how he does it!
ð How Mbark turned structure into freedom ( https://yhangry.com/chef-mbark-time-management-yhangry/?utm_campaign=Chef+Newsletter%3A+September+2025&utm_content=Chef+Newsletter%3A+30th+Sept&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )
( https://yhangry.com/chef-mbark-time-management-yhangry/?utm_campaign=Chef+Newsletter%3A+September+2025&utm_content=Chef+Newsletter%3A+30th+Sept&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )âThatâs a wrap for this month.Â
May your knives stay sharp, your pans never stick, and your events always leave smiles.Â
Keep cooking on your own terms, Chef! ð¨âð³
With Love,
Chef Team, yhangry

fixtures.subject: want to feature in Times magazine? submit your story by midnight
fixtures.body:
Hi Chef, it's Heinin from yhangry.
After our Economist article ( https://www.economist.com/culture/2025/08/11/private-chefs-are-spilling-the-culinary-secrets-of-the-super-rich?utm_campaign=SUPPLY%3A+economist+article+%28oct+16%29+v2&utm_content=SUPPLY%3A+economist+article+%28oct+19%29&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io ), we're getting lots of journalist interest in more private chef stories. And the Times (!) just told us they want to run a private chef article and asked us for content.
This is your chance to get featured in the Times!
If you want our PR toÂ pitch YOUR story, reply to this email with:
* The craziest thing that's happened to you as a private chef: who, what, where - the more detail the better.
* Your completed yhangry profile link. Our PR (who we pay for) will only pitch yhangry chefs, and any PR backlink will be to your yhangry chef profile, as our objective is to drive more bookings on yhangry.
Please also make sure your profile looks slick:
* Upload/edit photos ( https://yhangry.com/booking/account/chef/profile/images?utm_campaign=SUPPLY%3A+economist+article+%28oct+16%29+v2&utm_content=SUPPLY%3A+economist+article+%28oct+19%29&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io ):
* High-quality profile photo in which you look like a professional chef (wearing chef
whites/apron)
* High-quality background photo: Either of a beautifully plated dish/table or of yourself in a professional setting, cooking or serving clients
* Upload more menus ( https://yhangry.com/booking/account/chef/profile/menu?utm_campaign=SUPPLY%3A+economist+article+%28oct+16%29+v2&utm_content=SUPPLY%3A+economist+article+%28oct+19%29&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io ): At least 3 menus for clients to browse so they get an idea of your style of food. I recommend having a festive menu (Thanksgiving/Christmas), a BBQ menu, and a menu of your favorite cuisine, e.g., Italian, Mexican, Japanese, etc.
Best,
Heinin
Co-founder & Co-CEO @ yhangry
Unsubscribe ( https://track.customer.io/unsubscribe/dgST_AcDALijFrejFgGZ7czn1-FeQxIQTmK70Ps= )

fixtures.subject: 🎁BIG Gifts for You, On Us
fixtures.body:
Hello There,ð
Septemberâs rolled in - back to school, back to routineâ¦ but also back to hosting season. ð·
Weâve lined up a few giveaways youâll want to hear about ð
************************************
ð Back to School, Back to Hosting
************************************
Weâve got a little perk for September bookings: a free Yhangry jute bag ðï¸. Just use code BAG at checkout.
Picture this: a dachshund tucked in the bag (yes, weâve got the photo ð¾), and you turning up to your next dinner or weekend away with the cutest tote.
Because honestly, how cute would that bag look on you? Valid until September 30.
ðï¸ Use discount code BAG at checkout ( https://yhangry.com/?utm_campaign=September+Community+Newsletter&utm_content=September+Community+Newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )( https://yhangry.com/?utm_campaign=September+Community+Newsletter&utm_content=September+Community+Newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )
***********************************
Weâre Officially Live in the USA!
***********************************
We are the UK's #1 private chef platform - and now we're crossing the pond.
For the first time ever, anyone in the States can book a chef the Yhangry way: no stress, no clean-up, just restaurant-quality dining right at home.
And because this is big (really big), we're giving every new US customer a $200 voucher to celebrate.
Got friends in the States? Send them this ( https://launch.yhangry.com/?utm_campaign=September+Community+Newsletter&utm_content=September+Community+Newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io ) link. Planning a trip yourself? Perfect timing.
ð Claim Your $200 US Launch Gift ( https://launch.yhangry.com/?utm_campaign=September+Community+Newsletter&utm_content=September+Community+Newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )( https://launch.yhangry.com/?utm_campaign=September+Community+Newsletter&utm_content=September+Community+Newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )
***************************************
ð Christmas is Coming (Yes, Already)
***************************************
The calendarâs filling quicker than mulled wine disappears at a Christmas party.
Start looking for a chef and discuss dishes you love with chefs!
ð§âð³Book a private chef ( https://yhangry.com/?utm_campaign=September+Community+Newsletter&utm_content=September+Community+Newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )( https://yhangry.com/?utm_campaign=September+Community+Newsletter&utm_content=September+Community+Newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )âThatâs your September wrap â from jute bags to US launches to festive kickstarts.
With Love,
Siddhi & Heinin,
Co-founders, Yhangry

fixtures.subject: 🤞Thanks for entering to win!
fixtures.body:
yhangry ( https://yhangry.com/?utm_campaign=C12+-+Welcome&utm_content=C12+-+Welcome+%231&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )
****************
Good news David,
****************
Youâre officially in the running for a FREE DINNER PARTY, courtesy of yhangry!
Each and every month, we spread the joy of a gourmet meal to one lucky winner - so be sure to keep your eyes on your inbox for your chance to win!
Youâll get to choose menu selections like these; from the UKâs most accomplished chefs:
â
*****************************
Chef Fouad's Italiano Delight
*****************************
>From Â£44 pp / Min spend Â£313
Currently yhangryâs most sought-after chef, clients have referred to meals with Fouad as âgenuinely one of the best nights of food in my lifeâ; âabsolute geniusâ; and âthe best private chef in Londonâ.Â
chef fouad's italiano delight ( https://yhangry.com/booking/set-menu/italiano-delight/?utm_campaign=C12+-+Welcome&utm_content=C12+-+Welcome+%231&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )
Born in Algiers, Fouad grew up with five elder sisters and a mother- all of whom loved to cook.
He started working in a restaurant as early as 14, and to date, heâs worked in some of the most prestigious hotels and Michelin star restaurants all across Europe, including The Richmond Hill Hotel, The Savoy, London and more!
Take a look ( https://yhangry.com/booking/set-menu/italiano-delight/?utm_campaign=C12+-+Welcome&utm_content=C12+-+Welcome+%231&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )

************************************
>From Â£100 pp / Min spend Â£625
Hailing from Greece, Chef Christos's love affair with food began at a young age. He started developing his passion and talent while working at 5-star hotels and restaurants in the Hellenic Islands.
Chef Christosâ Sushi Party & Rolls ( https://yhangry.com/booking/set-menu/sushi-party-rolls/?utm_campaign=C12+-+Welcome&utm_content=C12+-+Welcome+%231&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )
Today, he is experienced in several cuisines, such as Italian, Mexican French, and Modern English cuisine, just to name a few. When he is not in the kitchen, Chef Christos likes playing football and having BBQs with his friends!
Take a look ( https://yhangry.com/booking/set-menu/sushi-party-rolls/?utm_campaign=C12+-+Welcome&utm_content=C12+-+Welcome+%231&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )

fixtures.subject: How does yhangry work? Pricing, commission, what to include?
fixtures.body:
Yhangry ( https://yhangry.com/?utm_campaign=SUPPLY%3A+Chef+Activation+Series+%5BUS%5D&utm_content=temp+FAQs+%2F+Book+Call&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )Hey Chef David,
You have questions, we have answers.
Commission: We charge 20% of your quoted price. To earn $800, mark up your price by 1.25 and quote $1,000.Â
Pricing: Unless otherwise specified, your price should always include ingredients, travel and any service staff that you require.
If a client cancels within 7 days of the event, you will receive payment in full.
Chef Mike is addressing some FAQs like pricing, commission, and cancellations.
Play ( https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6FAVwZGU_ww&utm_campaign=SUPPLY%3A+Chef+Activation+Series+%5BUS%5D&utm_content=temp+FAQs+%2F+Book+Call&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )Chef Mike has mentored hundreds of private chefs in the UK and helped them go from 0 bookings to earning $5,000 and $15,000 per month on yhangry.Â
Book onboarding call ( https://calendly.com/heinin/weekly-us-chef-onboarding?utm_campaign=SUPPLY%3A+Chef+Activation+Series+%5BUS%5D&utm_content=temp+FAQs+%2F+Book+Call&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )Facebook ( https://www.facebook.com/yhangry?utm_campaign=SUPPLY%3A+Chef+Activation+Series+%5BUS%5D&utm_content=temp+FAQs+%2F+Book+Call&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )Instagram ( https://www.instagram.com/yhangry/?utm_campaign=SUPPLY%3A+Chef+Activation+Series+%5BUS%5D&utm_content=temp+FAQs+%2F+Book+Call&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )
LinkedIn ( https://www.linkedin.com/company/14793893?utm_campaign=SUPPLY%3A+Chef+Activation+Series+%5BUS%5D&utm_content=temp+FAQs+%2F+Book+Call&utm_medium=email&utm_source=customer.io )
Â©2023 yhangry Ltd.
